lowest20.message: School drop-off blew up again and I'm spiraling about tomorrow.
lowest20.response:
That sounds worrying. You're not alone in this.

What may be happening right now is that everyone is running on low capacity, so even small demands can feel much bigger. What matters now is one steadier moment, not a perfect fix.

It makes sense that this is weighing on you.

Parenting a neurodivergent child asks a lot of you. Feeling stretched doesn't mean you're doing it wrong.
